title: Spec reconciliation: app-layer documents (appendix-senml units, compact_cot length typo, C comment accuracy)
description: (1) appendix-senml.md:67,75 uses '%RH' (relative humidity) for battery state-of-charge - wrong unit; IANA-registered is '%EL'; C chose '%'. Pick one (drives mmgu.15). (2) appendix-senml.md:38-39 uses RFC 8428 registered units 'lat'/'lon'; Python and C emit 'deg'; C senml.c:321-326 comment claims RFC 8428 says 'deg' - it does not. (3) 07-transport-app.md:156 says PLI is '18 bytes'; both implementations and compact_cot.json agree on 17 (discrepancy already documented in compact_cot.json:3) - fix the spec text. (4) C test comment lichen/tests/senml/main.c:57-62 claims cbor2 produces float32 - it produces float64; fix comment when mmgu.14 is decided.
